CORE_SIDEREAL_POSITIONS.convention: Lahiri ayanamsa; mean node for Rahu; Ketu at 180 degrees.

WHOLE_SIGN_HOUSES.convention: Whole-sign houses for lordships, yogas, aspects, and transit mapping.

VIMSHOTTARI_DASHA.convention: 365.25 days per year for date conversion.

PLANETARY_DIGNITY.convention: Natural friendships; node exaltation signs are marked as debated.

COMBUSTION.convention: Explicit configurable angular orbs by planet and motion.

PARASHARI_ASPECTS.convention: Sign-based graha drishti; node aspects excluded.

RASHI_DRISHTI.convention: Jaimini-style movable/fixed/dual sign aspect mapping, kept separate from Parashari graha drishti.

ASHTAKAVARGA.convention: Seven target planets and eight contributors; total validation 337.

YOGA_RULES.convention: Current set includes simplified rules and explicit caveats.

TRANSIT_WINDOWS.convention: Numerical sign-boundary and longitude-speed station searches.

DOMAIN_SYNTHESIS.convention: Structural support and current activation are separate non-probability scores.

EXTENDED_VARGAS.convention: D2, D3, D4, D12, and D30 working mappings; D16, D24, and D60 disabled pending validation.

BIRTH_TIME_SENSITIVITY.convention: Recompute nearby birth times at plus/minus 15, 30, and 60 minutes and compare house/varga outputs.

PLANETARY_STRENGTH_COMPONENTS.convention: Transparent dignity, combustion, D1/D9 vargottama, and directional-house components; explicitly not full Shadbala.
